Petition For Confirmation Of Short Sale, Transfer Of Property To Buyers Free Of Liens And Conversion Of Secured Debt To Unsecured Debt
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Darrin Ng appeared via zoom for Lindsay Barrick (petitioner).
Charles Flynn appeared in person. (pro per).
Bert Frank appeared in person (buyer).

Discussion was held regarding the delays to the sale of the property, that the omission of provisions about lien holders has complicated the transaction, that the delinquent taxes for each of the four parcels continue to grow due to additional penalties and intrest.

Mr. Flynn stated that the original loan was for $850,000.00 and that they are the senior lean holder in this matter, that they should not be held accountable for payment of attorney fees, property taxes, and real estate commission fees.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration And Petition For Additional Time Must Be Filed By Dec-19-2024
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Continued To Sep-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Darrin Ng for Lindsay Barrick, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Ng reported that the property sale is delayed due to issues with title transfer. The omission of provisions about lienholders has complicated the transaction. Completion of the sale is the final step before filing a petition for final distribution and expects 6 to 9 months timeframe to close the estate.

The court continued the status on close of estate hearing to September 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Undeveloped Land In Novato, Marin County, Ca)
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Darren Ng, Esq., for Lindsay Barrick, Executor.
Marcia Skall, of Golden Gate Sotheby's International Realty, real estate agent for Seller.
Stewart Moore, real estate agent for Buyer.

At the outset, the court acknowledges the pending notice issues that may require a continuance of the Report of Sale that is on calendar this morning. Counsel offers testimony regarding the notice issues as well as the issue of the lien holders not having signed consents to or releases. At conclusion of discussion, The sale was confirmed at $600,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Additional bond is not required.

The court states that it intends to grant the petition to vacate the previous order confirming sale of real property. The preceding petition and petition for order satisfaction of debt, etc., are taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Undeveloped Land In Novato, Marin County)
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Darrin Ng, Esq. for Lindsay Barrick (Executor). Richard Tremante (Commercial Real Estate Investments - Agent). Marcia Skall (Interested Party/Agent).

Mr. Tremante informs the Court that the correct sale amount is $1,200,00.00. Mr. Ng and Ms. Skall also confirm the sale amount at $1,200,000. The sale was then confirmed at $1,200,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Following the sale of the real property, the Court addressed the petition for satisfaction of debt and determination of expenses of administration related to property. Mr. Ng stated that the funds would be kept in the estate account until the final distribution. The Court asked if there were any objections. There being no objections, the petition was taken under submission. The Court stated that Mr. Ng's fees would be segregated.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1165 Schoool St, Sheep Ranch, Ca 95246)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Darrin Ng appeared by zoom for Lindsay Barrick.
John Pilgrim (Buyer) present in Court.

The Court stated that the only issue is that the notice of sale listed a 6% sales commission, but the local rules limits the commission to 5%. No overbids were placed. The sale was confirmed at $165,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed August 3, 2020. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Bond is waived. Status on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is set for October 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

12:20 p.m.
Upon further review, the status hearing on filing of the receipt for the blocked account is off calendar.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1165 Schoool St, Sheep Ranch, Ca 95246)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Sep-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Darrin Ng, Esq. , counsel for Lindsay Barrick, personal representative (appearing by video conference). John Pilgrim is present.

The Court notes a problem with publication of the Notice of Sale which Mr. Ng confirms. After brief discussion, the Court continues the matter to September 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Ng is to re-notice the hearing.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition For Approval Of Claim Against Estate By Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Darrin Ng for Lindsay Barrick (Petitioner).

Mr. Ng stated that he is not aware of anyone objecting or planning to object. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Claim Against Estate by Personal Representative (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
